originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__pid_output_699` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&pid_output` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(or (and (and MARLIN_H PIDTEMP) (not PID_DEBUG))
    (and MARLIN_H (not PIDTEMP))
    (and (and MARLIN_H PIDTEMP) PID_DEBUG)
    (and (and (not MARLIN_H) PIDTEMP) (not PID_DEBUG))
    (and (not MARLIN_H) (not PIDTEMP))
    (and (and (not MARLIN_H) PIDTEMP) PID_DEBUG))
model:
(define-fun PID_DEBUG () Bool
  false)
(define-fun MARLIN_H () Bool
  true)
(define-fun PIDTEMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: pid_output is assigned at L11 (pid_output=1) unconditionally and at L19 (pid_output=0) when !PIDTEMP, but is never read in any configuration. Genuine dead store across all compilable configs. No // ERROR for pid_output (the // ERROR at L16 marks a different bug). New bug. PC covers all combinations of MARLIN_H, PIDTEMP, PID_DEBUG (simplifies to true). Correctly constrained, no library macros.
